changes: Fixed an issue where the action Guillotine would not inflict damage to its main target.
Fixed an issue where the action Bioblaster failed to indicate that the additional effect of Analysis does not apply to its damage over time effect.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Abyssos (Savage)
new_content.description: Implemented the Echo, increasing players' maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.
